full_prompt: Design one mid-body structural ring frame of a high-volume low-cost hypersonic cruise missile benchmark. Missile diameter 0.53 m (21 inch Mk-41 VLS-compatible), overall length 6.0 m, launch mass 1500 kg, cruise Mach 6 at 80,000 ft on scramjet sustainer, range 1500 km, warhead 100 kg, unit cost cap US$1,000,000 in lot-1000 production. Ring frame is located at the inlet-to-combustor bulkhead station (axial position 2.5 m from nose). Frame material: Inconel 718 aged (Young's modulus 200 GPa, Poisson 0.29, yield 1034 MPa, ultimate 1240 MPa, density 8190 kg/m^3) given sustained skin temperature ~900 C at Mach 6 / 80 kft stagnation. Frame geometry: I-cross section radial depth 80 mm x flange width 50 mm x web 6 mm x flange 8 mm, formed into a full 530 mm OD ring with six equally-spaced radial fittings for inlet/combustor attachment. Load cases per missile RFP baseline + MIL-HDBK-516C Part V: (LC1) maneuver 30 g normal at Mach 6 cruise; (LC2) axial thrust transient: scramjet restart transient 2.5 g forward for 200 ms; (LC3) aerodynamic pressure load: cruise dynamic pressure q = 70 kPa acting on external skin, transmitted to frame as radial 80 kN inward on six fittings; (LC4) thermal: uniform ring temperature sustained 900 C, with forward flange at 900 C and aft flange at 600 C (300 C gradient) through a 20-minute cruise; (LC5) launch VLS ejection: 15 g axial for 200 ms; (LC6) combined thermo-structural: LC1 + LC4 simultaneous. Pass/fail: (R1) at 900 C, Inconel 718 retains yield ~790 MPa, ultimate ~965 MPa; max von Mises across LC1-LC3 and LC5 at elevated temp <= 643 MPa (ultimate_hot 965 / 1.5); (R2) LC4 + LC6 combined thermo-mechanical stress <= 790 MPa (yield at 900 C); (R3) ring out-of-round distortion under LC4 <= 0.5 mm; (R4) first ovalization mode >= 150 Hz; (R5) mass per frame <= 8.5 kg to hit cost + weight targets. Deliverables: STEP AP242, coupled thermal-structural FEA per case, modal, and mass report.
short_prompt:
Design one mid-body structural ring frame of a high-volume low-cost hypersonic cruise missile, located at the scramjet inlet-to-combustor bulkhead station (axial 2.5 m from nose). Cruise is Mach 6 at 80,000 ft with sustained skin ~900 C, so the frame is sized hot. Material class: Inconel 718 aged, with elevated-temperature allowables (yield ~790 MPa / ultimate ~965 MPa at 900 C). Qualify per MIL-HDBK-516C Part V missile criteria, ultimate FoS 1.5 on hot allowables.

Envelope: 530 mm OD (21 in Mk-41 VLS compatible) cylindrical frame with an I cross-section on the order of 80 mm radial depth, with six equally-spaced radial inlet/combustor fittings.

Load cases.
- LC1 maneuver: 30 g normal at Mach 6 cruise.
- LC2 scramjet restart: 2.5 g forward axial for 200 ms.
- LC3 aerodynamic pressure: q = 70 kPa cruise, transmitted as 80 kN radial inward on each of six fittings.
- LC4 thermal: sustained ring 900 C with forward flange 900 C / aft flange 600 C (300 C through-depth gradient), 20 min cruise.
- LC5 VLS ejection: 15 g axial for 200 ms.
- LC6 combined: LC1 + LC4 simultaneous.

prompt.title: Hypersonic cruise missile mid-body ring frame
prompt.brief: Inconel 718 ring frame at scramjet inlet-combustor bulkhead, Mach 6 at 80 kft.
